# kSecAttrAuthenticationType

**Global Variable**

A key whose value indicates the item’s authentication scheme.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecAttrAuthenticationType: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFString] and denotes the authentication scheme for this item (see [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/item-attribute-keys-and-values#Authentication-Type-Values]).
title: kSecAttrAuthenticationType
